Join our team

Help build the future of quantum‑safe cybersecurity with a team that values curiosity, collaboration, and impact.

Get in touch
Why Crypto4A?

Join a team that's securing the world's digital infrastructure with cutting-edge, quantum-safe technology. Whether you're an emerging engineer, a security architect, or a seasoned tech leader, Crypto4A offers the opportunity to do mission-driven work that matters for decades to come. We're not just preparing for the post-quantum era—we're shaping it.

We value curiosity, collaboration, and craftsmanship. Expect focused problem-solving, supportive mentorship, and opportunities to learn by building.

• Team events and social gatherings
• Hybrid and flexible work styles
• Product-first, security-centric culture
Perks of working at Crypto4A

At Crypto4A, we're more than just a leading quantum-safe cybersecurity company, we're a people-first, innovation-driven workplace. Here's what makes working with us rewarding, meaningful, and empowering:

Work-Life Balance

We prioritize employee well-being by promoting a healthy work-life balance. Whether you're managing family responsibilities or pursuing personal interests, we support you with reasonable workloads and paid time off to recharge.

Collaborative and Inclusive Culture

We thrive on diversity of thought and experience. Our team is made up of passionate professionals across cybersecurity, engineering
